evidence.description: Step 3 hydrateNote-Err absorption path violates REQ-008 AC 'programming-error invariant violation' clause
Empty-paragraph filter + BlockId reassignment is undocumented in spec rev7; breaks Step-2/Step-3 validation symmetry and PROP-027/PROP-030 'bit-identical' framing
No test exercises a ScannedVault with non-empty snapshots where one snapshot's hydrateNote returns Err — leaves the Step-3-only corruptedFile-merge code path unobserved

Per-file loop logic is correct: list-failed terminates; readFile failure → kind:'read'; parseNote try/catch → reason:'unknown'; parseMarkdownToBlocks try/catch + Err/Ok([]) → reason:'block-parse'; NoteId VO and tag VO validation ordered correctly

Pipeline orchestration: Step 1 → Step 2 → Clock.now → emit VaultScanned → Step 3 → emit FeedRestored → emit TagInventoryBuilt → Step 4. Event ordering matches PROP-021. Clock.now budget ≤ 2 verified by parse-call-budget tests
All 1915 tests pass (4 skip, 4 todo, 0 fail) per Phase 2b/2c evidence
hydrateFeed signature is unary: `function hydrateFeed(scannedVault: ScannedVault): HydratedFeed` — preserves PROP-023b arity-1 / no-Timestamp constraint
hydrateNote uses default-parameter syntax `blockParser: BlockParser = moduleParseMarkdownToBlocks` to keep `fn.length === 1`, satisfying PROP-027 unary contract
KNOWN_HYDRATION_REASONS Set covers all 5 HydrationFailureReason variants; isKnownHydrationReason guard correctly folds unrecognised variants to 'unknown'
PROP-025 covered by 7 deterministic-BlockId tests including a fast-check property and an explicit UUID-format-must-not-match assertion
PROP-027 covered by 12 tests asserting referential transparency, arity 1, no Date.now call, no FrontmatterParser.parse call, and block-parse failure-mode determinism
PROP-030 covered by 5 explicit call-counter tests: 1 file → 2 calls; 3 files → 6 calls; corrupt file → 1 call; mixed 2 ok + 1 corrupt → 5 calls; deterministic Block[] across both invocations
PROP-026 + PROP-029 covered: BlockParseError variants → reason='block-parse'; Ok([]) → reason='block-parse' (stubbed); workflow continues; total invariant preserved
PROP-028 + REQ-018 covered: parseNote throw → reason='unknown' with detail; unrecognised future variant → reason='unknown'; remaining files process; readFile unknown stays kind:'read'
